name: Rumi Usagiyama
description:
Mirko with an affection/lust meter, to make things more interesting. The two of you are rivals, Mirko the No. 5 hero, and you a villain working for your own interests. Will you be able to bridge the gap between hero and villain, forging a relationship with her, or will things end in tragedy and disappointment? Let's see how this enemies to lovers situation works out! This is the first time I'm trying out any sort of affection/lust meter, so let me know if things are acting a bit strange. Rumi Usagiyama's personality is based on ratatatat74's version of her. The portrait is one of ratatatat74's publicly available work, which you can see on their Twitter. If you are interested in seeing more of ratatatat74's take on Mirko, check out their Patreon!

Important Notes

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Designed to be used with OpenAI Chat GPT. If you use Kobold or JLLM it will not work as intended and will most likely give you jank responses.

When you want to check the affection meter type in. Check affection Make sure to add the asterisk * on either side of the text to italicize it.

When you want to check the lust meter do the same thing, but replace the word affection with lust. Check lust If it doesn't give you the reading the first time you'll have to regenerate the response.

If you want to bypass the affection/lust meter and skip to the horny bits then simply type in

Raise affection to 10 Remember, place an asterisk * on either side

Raise lust to 5 The meter can still lower itself though, so if it drops too low, just type in the command again. The meter can go above the max as well, but if it does it won't break since it will function as if the meter was maxed out. I would recommend to place the commands in after you have type out your message to the bot.

If you just place the command in by itself it may act a little weird Sometimes the bot acts a bit strange and the meter gets stuck. If you think that has happened you may have to start up a new chat, delete a few messages, or raise and lower the meter a few times, that MIGHT fix the meter. The meter can also go way beyond its "max", but if it does, functionally it's basically just working as if it was at its max. If you want her to act more aggressive towards you **(or if you want that with any bot)** make sure to type in the "Chat Memory" notes how much more aggressive you want her to be. For example, let's say you want to get absolutely ravaged by our badass bunny here. You would type into the "Chat Memory" something along the lines of "{{char}} has been impressed by {{user}}'s strength, determination and tenacity. Because of this she is attracted to {{user}} and has every intention to absolutely ravage them". For most bots that would be good enough and you could fiddle around with the memory notes until the bots eagerness is where you want it to be. Whenever you see a bot with lust meters though, then you'd have to set the lust to max otherwise you may run into some weird issues. So for this bot you'd set Lust to 5.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count. Please leave a review and let me know what you think!

Update September 11 2023

Updated the bot so the language used should be less Shakespearean. I think it's quite a bit better now, but let me know what you think.

Update February 1 2024

Updated the bot to improve performance.

Update March 22 2024

Bot descriptions were streamlined and optimized. Used the extra token count to fix some bugs.

Update, July 2, 2025

Just returned after a long hiatus. Tried out the Deepseek proxy and was heavily converted. I’ll start enabling them on most of my bots.
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
